themes.label: Fear/Anxiety
themes.summary: This chapter deals with fear, dread, anxiety, alarm, or the call not to be afraid. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "'My heart panted, fearfulness affrighted me: the night of my pleasure hath he turned into fea...". Word-study detail reinforces "לַחֲרָדָֽה׃: into fear - fear, anxiety".
